features.title: Snapshot data adapter
acceptance: Build StockSnapshot objects from market K-line data, realtime quote, valuation, flow, sector and notes.
Adapter works with injected providers so tests do not require network.
evidence: 26 tests passed; real trading scan produced 华虹宏力 watch and 招商银行 avoid for short-term trading; real position scan produced 招商银行 watch and 688347 avoid.
Generated 20-stock discovered A-share report: 0 buy candidates, 12 watchlist, 8 risk/avoid, 0 errors.

features.title: Batch scanner and report model
acceptance: Scan a user-provided stock universe in position or trading mode.
Return ranked buy candidates, watchlist, reduce/avoid list, and a readable text report.
evidence: format_report now outputs status plus six dimensions per stock; JSON decisions include status and dimensions.
Generated reports/stock_selection_result_2026-06-18.md from real A/HK/US position and trading scans.
Focused verification passed: 8 agent tests passed after scanner/report changes.
Action states now distinguish buy_now, probe, wait_pullback, wait_breakout, hold_watch, reduce_protect, avoid.
Real trading scan produced actionable states: 中芯国际 688981 buy_now; 汇丰控股 00005, HOOD, 快手-W 01024, TSM, AMD, LLY, ARM, CRWV probe.
Generated reports/actionable_stocks_2026-06-18.md and stopped expanding the stock pool after actionable names appeared.
Focused verification passed: 10 agent tests passed.

features.title: API integration
acceptance: Expose a FastAPI endpoint for scanning a small explicit universe.
Endpoint returns structured decisions without auto-trading behavior.

features.title: Real small-universe smoke validation
acceptance: Run the scanner on a small universe including 招商银行 and 华虹宏力.
Capture limitations from any flaky external endpoint.

features.title: Backtest engine reusing StockAgent (event-driven)
acceptance: Daily event loop calls AsOfStockDataProvider + SnapshotBuilder + StockAgent.evaluate (zero logic drift).
K-line prefetch cache to data/stock.db; cooldown dedup (60 trading days).
Holding-period returns for windows 5/10/20/60 days; insufficient data marked None.
evidence: 6 unit tests passed (prefetch, event loop, cooldown, return formula, metrics, report)

features.title: Backtest end-to-end smoke with real data
acceptance: Run on small universe (3 symbols, 6 months) with real data.
Produce reports/backtest_result_<start>_<end>.md with win-rate table + benchmark.
